description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: lint, test, and deploy. Add a linting job in the lint stage that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-pip, pip3 install -r requirements.txt, pycodestyle *.py --ignore=E501, and bash tests/custom-linting.sh, and uses the gitlab-org runner tag. Add a run_tests job in the test stage that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python3-dev python3-pip, pip3 install -r requirements.txt, and python3 -m pytest tests -v, also with the gitlab-org tag. Add a staging job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, executes apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=mensa-thumb-bot --api-key=$HEROKU_STAGING_API_KEY, and uses the gitlab-org tag.
